goal: Agentic, thread-based, bespoke data-storytelling tool over SF DBI data for homeowners: agent interviews user -> records evolving plan -> on approval renders a custom DashboardSpec of meaningful interactive charts + narrative + red-flag callouts, editable via a persistent assistant-ui modal; multi-thread goal switching.

decision.title: Render architecture
decision.value: HYBRID — declarative DashboardSpec primary + dynamic-worker custom-chart escape hatch (inert artifacts only: vega spec or sanitized SVG; never browser-executed UI code). See RESEARCH.md s1.

rules: Reuse existing stack: ChatBroker AIChatAgent DO, analytics tool catalog, data-platform R2 SQL guard + /api/r2/query, @/components/ui/map, shadcn ChartContainer.

SHARED chart style profile (lib/chart-style.ts) on EVERY chart (declarative + custom): fill='var(--foreground)' (NEVER hsl(var(--foreground))); white value labels inside/top; single graduated BLUE hue family (no rainbow); dark theme; skeletons while loading.
FULL shadcn Recharts catalog: area/bar/line/pie-donut/radar/radial/scatter + variants, each exposing its full API config via spec encoding.

Centralized badge colors (lib/dbi-badges.ts) are the ONLY source for trade-category (building=black/white), permit-type, status, neighborhood (Portola=purple) badges + rounded green cost badge ($300/$42k/$1.2M). Consistent everywhere.
Gantt + timeline-steps (abui registry) in the permit viewport show schedule + milestones from SODA/warehouse events; dates ISO YYYY-MM-DD ONLY, never timestamps.

Standard permits_table everywhere permits underlie a page: permit_number->viewport modal, badged trade/type/status/neighborhood, green rounded cost, address-grouped sort, has-addenda flag, wrapping description, sort+search+filters.
Data-scope filters per page: editing buffers + shows a shadcn Alert+Save ('pending changes to the filtered data scope'); Save writes thread_filters, re-runs only bound blocks with skeletons.

Custom charts: dynamic worker (WORKER_LOADERS, globalOutbound:null) returns an inert artifact (vega JSON or sanitized SVG); rendered as a first-class 'custom' block; no worker JS/React in the browser.
All /api/* zod-openapi typed; /health + D1 logging; never hand-edit worker-configuration.d.ts (run cf-typegen).
Encode the 8 R2 SQL gotchas (RESEARCH.md s2) into NL->SQL prompt + named-query templates.
Red-flag outputs are triage candidates, never accusations.
Deploy only via pnpm run deploy. Commit per task id.

tasks.title: storyteller D1 schema + migration
tasks.description: Create src/backend/db/schemas/storyteller/{threads,messages,thread_data_plans,dashboard_specs,agentic_sf_context,named_queries,thread_filters}.ts (Drizzle + drizzle-zod) + index.ts barrel; re-export from db/schema.ts; pnpm db:generate; migrate:local.

tasks.title: Seed agentic_sf_context (62 rows)
tasks.description: Idempotent seed route/script loading docs/0002_agentic_homeowner/agentic_sf_context.seed.json into agentic_sf_context (category, topic, content, data_signals json, homeowner_action, priority, enabled=true).

tasks.title: Threads/messages/plans/specs/filters REST API
tasks.description: Hono zod-openapi routers: /api/threads (CRUD + :id detail incl. messages, live spec, active filters), /api/threads/:id/plans (+ /approve), /api/threads/:id/specs (+ /approve, PATCH /blocks), /api/threads/:id/filters. /health + D1 logging.

tasks.title: agentic_sf_context CRUD API
tasks.description: /api/context GET/POST/PATCH (category filter, enabled toggle, priority). zod-openapi typed.

tasks.title: named_queries + guarded execution wiring
tasks.description: Persist/reuse named guarded SQL; resolve QueryRef (named|inline) + bind active thread_filters -> guard -> /api/r2/query. Register the 8 validated use cases (RESEARCH.md s2) as global named-query templates with params.
acceptance: named query executes with bound params

tasks.title: DashboardSpec types + validator
tasks.description: Shared TS types (PROMPT.md DashboardSpec) incl. blocks narrative/kpi_cards/chart(full ChartFamily)/map/permits_table/gantt/timeline_steps/table/callout/custom + a server-side validator enforcing the block-type allowlist, ChartFamily allowlist, span limits, and QueryRef guarding. Used by propose_dashboard / update_dashboard_block.

tasks.title: Homeowner agent tools on ChatBroker
tasks.description: Add set_goal, geocode_address, list_context, save_data_plan, propose_dashboard, approve_dashboard, update_dashboard_block, find_similar_permits, inspector_profile, contractor_reputation, permit_timeline, redflag_scan (PROMPT.md Tools). Scope tools return rows + reusable namedQueryId.

tasks.title: Agent system prompt + state machine + context grounding
tasks.description: System prompt embeds the state machine gating (no propose before approved plan; never auto-approve), pulls enabled agentic_sf_context via list_context to ground reasoning, encodes the 8 SQL gotchas, and knows when to use a custom (dynamic-worker) chart vs a catalog block. Goal-category aware interview questions.
acceptance: falls back to custom block only when catalog can't express the request

tasks.title: Custom-chart dynamic-worker pipeline (hybrid escape hatch)
tasks.description: propose_custom_chart tool + a Dynamic Worker (WORKER_LOADERS, globalOutbound:null) that takes {data, request} and returns an INERT artifact: preferred Vega-Lite JSON, fallback sanitized server-rendered SVG. /api endpoint serves the artifact for a 'custom' block. Validate Worker Loaders limits via cloudflare-docs MCP first.
acceptance: custom block renders a vega spec via vetted client lib AND a sanitized SVG path
no worker JS executes in browser

tasks.title: Chart style profile + badge-color utils modules
tasks.description: src/frontend/lib/chart-style.ts (shared: var(--foreground) labels, white value labels, single blue hue ramp, tooltip/legend defaults) and src/frontend/lib/dbi-badges.ts (trade-category[building=black/white], permit-type, status, neighborhood[Portola=purple] color maps + rounded green cost badge formatter). Single source of truth.
acceptance: badge color for a value is identical wherever rendered

tasks.title: Full shadcn Recharts catalog
tasks.description: components/storyteller/charts/: area(+stacked/step), bar(+horizontal/grouped/stacked/labeled), line(+multi/step), pie/donut, radar, radial, scatter, plus derived presets histogram/permit_lifecycle/ranked_bar. Each a thin wrapper exposing its full API config via spec encoding, all on chart-style profile.
acceptance: every ChartFamily renders from its data shape
full prop surface configurable via encoding

tasks.title: Registry components: Gantt + timeline-steps + maps
tasks.description: Add abui timeline (Gantt schedule) + timeline-steps (npx shadcn add timeline); build gantt + timeline_steps block components rendering permit schedule/milestones from SODA+warehouse events, ISO YYYY-MM-DD only. Confirm map_markers + map_clusters (aggregated counts) on @/components/ui/map.
acceptance: gantt plots a permit's events as ISO dates

tasks.title: Standard permits_table block
tasks.description: components/storyteller/PermitsScopeTable: permit_number(->viewport modal), trade-category badge, permit-type badge, status badge, site address[number+name] (default sort groups permits per address), neighborhood badge, rounded green cost badge, has-addenda flag (building permit or its child electrical/plumbing rollup), wrapping description; sort + search + per-column filters. Uses dbi-badges.
acceptance: has-addenda flag correct incl child->building rollup

tasks.title: DashboardRenderer + data-scope FilterBar + Save/skeleton
tasks.description: Spec-driven renderer: switch(block.type)->catalog template (incl custom); resolve QueryRef + active filters -> /api/r2/query (cache by query+params). Data-scope FilterBar buffers edits + shows shadcn Alert+Save ('pending changes to the filtered data scope'); Save writes thread_filters and re-runs only bound blocks with shadcn Skeletons.
acceptance: renders a multi-block live spec incl custom
editing a filter shows the Save alert
Save refetches bound blocks with skeletons

tasks.title: ThreadSwitcher + AssistantModal
tasks.description: Left ThreadSwitcher (grouped by goal_category, pinned/active/archived, + New goal) sets active thread; persistent bottom-right AssistantModal (assistant-ui useAgent->useAgentChat->useAISDKRuntime) bound to ChatBroker by threadId, renders tool confirms (approve plan/dashboard).
acceptance: asking for an edit updates the live dashboard

tasks.title: ContextConfigPanel
tasks.description: /storyteller/context self-serve CRUD over agentic_sf_context (data table by category, edit drawer: topic/content/data_signals tags/homeowner_action/priority/enabled). Routed in nav.
acceptance: enabled toggle hides/shows context to the agent

tasks.title: Storyteller page + nav + permit viewport integration
tasks.description: /storyteller (or /threads/[id]) 3-zone Astro shell mounting the islands; nav config; shared header; mobile-responsive (collapsible switcher). Extend PermitViewer to include the Gantt + timeline-steps + addenda for the permit.
acceptance: permit viewport shows gantt + milestones + addenda

tasks.title: Lint, build, deploy, verify
tasks.description: pnpm lint + build green; cf-typegen for any binding change; pnpm run deploy; verify full flow live (interview -> plan -> approve -> render incl custom block -> filter Save -> edit) + /openapi.json. Update AGENTS.md with the storyteller domain + hybrid render architecture + style/badge utils + custom-chart pipeline.
acceptance: live end-to-end flow verified incl custom chart + filter Save

tasks.title: (Optional) Saved monitors / alerts
tasks.description: Scheduled named-query monitors on address/contractor/neighborhood (new complaints/NOVs/holds/inspector changes) -> notifications. Designed-for now; build later.
acceptance: a saved monitor detects a new matching row on schedule
